items.name: GoodyOS
items.description: GoodyOS is a user‑first privacy Linux distribution built on Debian Bookworm with KDE Plasma. It features the Ghost identity‑spoofing system, Mullvad VPN integration, hardened security defaults, LAST-CALL emergency wipe, and a curated toolset for developers, security professionals, and privacy‑focused users.
